# BlockchainWire

> Web3 press release distribution to AP News, Yahoo Finance, Business Insider, and 1,200+ financial and crypto media outlets. Google News indexed. Up to 82M reach.

BlockchainWire is a press release distribution service built specifically for Web3, blockchain, cryptocurrency, DeFi, NFT, and digital asset companies. Releases are syndicated across tier-1 financial media, crypto-native outlets, and global newswire networks. Content is optimized for search, AI answer engines, and traditional financial media indexing.

## Services

- Press Release Distribution: https://blockchainwire.io/products
- BeSpoke Custom Campaigns: https://blockchainwire.io/bespoke
- Media Network Access: https://blockchainwire.io/company/media-network
- AI and Search Visibility: https://blockchainwire.io/products
- Editorial and Optimization: https://blockchainwire.io/editorial-guidelines
- Analytics and Reporting: https://blockchainwire.io/release-performance-insights

## Pricing

- Pro: $295. Google News indexed, BizWire Express, EIN Presswire, MENAFN, up to 15 crypto placements.
- Elite: $395. 71M+ reach, Associated Press, Barchart, Benzinga, Business Insider, Globe and Mail, 20 crypto placements.
- Premium: $495. 82M+ reach, AP, Benzinga, Business Insider, MarketWatch, Street Insider, Google News indexing, 25+ crypto placements, fastest turnaround.
- BeSpoke: $2,500 to $12,000 per month for custom multi-platform campaigns.

## Audiences

- Web3 startups launching products, raising rounds, or announcing partnerships
- Cryptocurrency exchanges announcing listings, features, or compliance milestones
- Token projects coordinating launches and market-moving disclosures
- Public companies with digital asset exposure reaching investor audiences
- Agencies managing crypto, DeFi, and NFT client communications
- Events and partnerships requiring coordinated multi-outlet coverage
